title: CreativeHeads
description: A mod that adds Minecraft Heads from Minecraft Heads V2.0 to the creative inventory for easier access to builders!
body:
# CreativeHeads
## What is this mod?
This mod adds 100+ heads from the Minecraft Heads API V2.0 (https://minecraft-heads.com/) into the creative inventory for easy access for builders!
## What versions does it support?
At the moment it supports Fabric 1.20.1 and 1.21.7 only but later on when I get more free time I can easily port for more versions to support.
## Credits
- Minecraft Heads API V2.0 (https://minecraft-heads.com/) 
  
![Minecraft Heads Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1183cf8a63419642c14daedb9eeddf1496f5f28_0.webp)
